principle: Neon should own canonical truth; static JSON should become cache/build artifacts only.

tables.name: beauty_product_catalog_items
tables.purpose: Global canonical catalog imported from XLSX and later official sources.

tables.name: beauty_observed_items
tables.purpose: Observed salon usage identities separated from catalog truth.

tables.name: beauty_series_dictionary
tables.purpose: Curated product knowledge by brand and series.

tables.name: beauty_shade_intelligence
tables.purpose: Shade-level market classification and observed evidence.

tables.name: beauty_dictionary_sources
tables.purpose: Evidence layer for product and series verification.

importStrategy: Bulk import current public/catalog-brands/*.json into beauty_product_catalog_items.
Bulk import current public/beauty-intelligence/* into observed/series/shade intelligence tables.
Keep existing JSON generation as fallback until Admin reads from Neon successfully.
Switch Netlify beauty-intelligence routes to read from Neon first and static JSON only as fallback.
